citations.quote: Edinburgh Napier University have not vetted the any of the premises contained within this document and cannot be held responsible for the experience of guests at these premises.
Kick Ass Greyfriars ... Price starting from £14
Hotels near Craiglockhart, Merchiston and Sighthill Campuses
By Bus – Must have exact change for buses or contactless card
Edinburgh Napier University has no affiliation with any of the premises listed.
Prices are not static they will change according to availability and usually increase at weekends.

findings.text: Document is a visitor accommodation and transport guide published by Edinburgh Napier University, with disclaimers of no vetting or affiliation.
Extraction covers all major sections: transport (bus, air, rail, taxi), hostels (10 listings), and hotels near campuses.
Document is a general visitor guide; no direct link to student accommodation arrears or tenancy terms identified.
Hostel prices are dynamic and typically increase on weekends; booking direct recommended for extras.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Extraction Verification Report for NAP-SRC-0004

**Source:** Edinburgh Short Term Stays and Transport Updated May 2025.doc
**Extraction Method:** libreoffice_text (confidence 0.85)
**Coverage Status:** complete

### Findings
- All major sections extracted: transport (bus, air, rail, taxi), hostel listings (10 entries with prices, distances, contact info), hotel listings near campuses.
- Disclaimers preserved: university has not vetted premises and has no affiliation.
- No OCR errors or missing text detected.
- Document is a general visitor accommodation guide, not a tenancy or arrears record.

### Recommendation
Confirm whether this document is relevant to the accommodation arrears matter. If not, consider excluding from further analysis.
